notes: The final wave of STRATEGIC-INITIATIVES-SPEC: the presentation a book of capital programs deserves. - The valuation waterfall. The Strategic Initiatives view now draws operating core (the composite, ex-add-ons, labelled) + each initiative's faded per-share value = total, against the current price. When no operating core is available the waterfall says it is incomplete rather than pretending the add-on is the whole company. - Tornado sensitivity. Per initiative (🌪 on the card): one-at-a-time conventional shocks — revenue and margin ±20%, horizon ±1 year, discount rate ±1pp, each unresolved gat
